pvpTeams.name: Mimikyu balance
pvpTeams.plan: Use Mimikyu's shield-like Disguise pressure up front, preserve Lickilicky as the neutral pivot, and save Empoleon for closing Steel/Water coverage.

pvpTeams.name: Altaria control
pvpTeams.plan: Altaria pressures Fighters and Grass, Jellicent absorbs neutral play, and Tinkaton closes into Dragons and Fairies when Ground is controlled.

pvpTeams.name: Virizion anti-core
pvpTeams.plan: Virizion checks Water and Steel, Lickilicky resets alignment, and Corviknight closes with broad resistances; Fire alignment needs active management.

pvpTeams.name: Giratina balance
pvpTeams.plan: Giratina supplies bulk, Shadow Empoleon flips tempo with damage, and Florges is held for Dragon or Dark cleanup.

pvpTeams.name: Origin Palkia balance
pvpTeams.plan: Origin Palkia leads with fast neutral pressure, Crowned Zacian absorbs Dragon/Fairy alignment, and Ho-Oh closes when Rock threats are removed.

pvpTeams.name: Origin Dialga water-fairy
pvpTeams.plan: Origin Dialga anchors the lead, Kyogre draws out Water answers, and Xerneas closes into Dragons and Dark types.
